//: v7.6.6 — Reconstructed from project conventions; original config was missing from the v7.6.3 ZIP (Bug C in the v7.6.3 erweiterte Analyse). Selective check pattern: files opt in via // @ts-check (201 files at v7.6.3), allowJs: true, .d.ts files in types/ provide ambient typing. v7.6.4 in-version T1 fix: ignoreDeprecations was '6.0' in the v7.6.3 reconstruction (TypeScript 6 does not exist; TypeScript 5.9.x pinned by package-lock.json accepts only '5.0'). v7.6.4 in-version T5 closeout: the 27 latent TS errors that surfaced after T1 (Mixin _sub/_unsubAll grafting, late-binding properties on GoalSynthesizer/AdaptiveStrategy, apply-delegate access to parent internals on AdaptiveStrategy, AutoUpdater config.autoApply outside DEFAULTS) are now all resolved structurally. Mixin hosts declare typed stub methods that the helper replaces unconditionally at module load; late-binding properties are explicitly initialised as null in their constructors with matching JSDoc @type; the apply-delegate methods on AdaptiveStrategy no longer carry @private JSDoc tags (the apply-pattern is the documented caller); AutoUpdater opts type was widened to admit autoApply outside DEFAULTS. tsc --project tsconfig.ci.json --noEmit exits 0; ci:full reaches the build-bundle step without aborting.
